chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S- 158 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 14-11-2023. Mr. Shahid Ali Phulpoto, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G for the State. Mst. Fahmeeda Khatoon in person. ******** The applicant by way of instant Crl: Misc: Application has impugned an order dated 12-10-2022 passed by learned IVth Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur, whereby his application u/s 22 A/B Cr.P.C for issuance of direction against the police to record his FIR was dismissed. There is dispute between the parties over house and such dispute the applicant apparently is intending to resolve by having a short cut by involving the proposed accused in a Criminal case. Even otherwise no illegality is noticed in the impugned order which may justify this Court to make interference with the same by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
